visual_description: (00:00-00:05) A man in a peach-colored polo shirt and glasses lies on a white couch, smoking a cigar with a relaxed expression. A woman with dark, curly hair, wearing a leopard-print dress, leans over him, whispering intimately in his ear. He places his hand on her chest as they interact. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a seductive and possibly illicit relationship between the man and the woman, setting a tone of sensuality and power.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, ethereal, and slightly tense musical score plays, creating a dreamy and suspenseful mood.)
